TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pacay a kamu misuayaw tu sakalawpesan a kamuan, sadikuday musakamuay tu kamu nu Pacay-yi a tademaw itini i tusep-caysep a mihcaan, nina mabelecay a tademaw ci Pan-cin-yi tatayna, hatidaay tu nu Pacay-cuzen mala layak tu namin, casiw-caysiw a mihcaan ni lecuhan, yu maudip henay napalekal tu " pacay-yi" a kamuan. Tusep-sepcay a mihcaan namipadang ci Pan-cin-yi tu mikinkiway tu cudadan ci Li-zen-kuy yunse tu kamuan, atu Dipun seace ci Seten-ce misulit tu " Pacay-yi zidin", atu niyadu'ay a tademaw ci Wanpan-mei-yi nisangaan nu udip tu adidiay nu zidin " Ama' Atu-nu a Pacayn nakamuan. tusep-caysep mihcaan lima a bulad Nantuo Pacay binacadan lalangawan seahuy lisecen ci Pan-wen-hui sakamusa, ayda nu pina a mihcaan nu Pacay-zen itini i nipipadang nu seahu, aydaay a wawa pasubabalaki sabaw tu pina ku matinengay musakamu tu Pacay-yi, cay tu kaw babalaki a cacay ku matinengay musakamu, sasa ayda inai'tu ku sayaway musakamuay nu tademaw. aydaay nu Nantuo Puli Aylan kiwkay tu payduyu nu sananal u kamu nu Pacay-yi ku kamu nida.
S.PHON: pa ¶aj a kamu misuajaw tu sakar~…ĺawp…ôsan a kamuan, sadikudaj musakamuaj tu kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji a tad…ômaw itini i tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp a mińß ¶aan, nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tatajna, ńßatidaaj tu nu pa ¶aj- ¶uz…ôn mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajak tu namin, ¶asiw- ¶ajsiw a mińß ¶aan ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ju maudip ńß…ônaj napar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " pa ¶aj-ji" a kamuan. tus…ôp-s…ôp ¶aj a mińß ¶aan namipadaŇč ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tu mikinkiwaj tu ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺi-z…ôn-kuj juns…ô tu kamuan, atu dipun s…ôa ¶…ô ¶i s…ôt…ôn- ¶…ô misur~…ĺit tu " pa ¶aj-ji zidin", atu nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw ¶i wanpan-m…ôi-ji nisaŇčaan nu udip tu adidiaj nu zidin " ama Ē~ ° atu-nu a pa ¶ajn nakamuan. tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad nantuo pa ¶aj bina ¶adan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôańßuj r~…ĺis…ô ¶…ôn ¶i pan-w…ôn-ńßui sakamusa, ajda nu pina a mińß ¶aan nu pa ¶aj-z…ôn itini i nipipadaŇč nu s…ôańßu, ajdaaj a wawa pasubabar~…ĺaki sabaw tu pina ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu pa ¶aj-ji, ¶aj tu kaw babar~…ĺaki a ¶a ¶aj ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu, sasa ajda inai Ē~ °tu ku sajawaj musakamuaj nu tad…ômaw. ajdaaj nu nantuo pur~…ĺi ajr~…ĺan kiwkaj tu pajduju nu sananar~…ĺ u kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji ku kamu nida.
S.FORM: Pacay a kamu misuayaw tu sakalawpesan a kamuan, sadikuday musakamuay tu kamu nu Pacay-yi a tademaw itini i tusep-caysep a mihcaan, nina mabelecay a tademaw ci Pan-cin-yi tatayna, hatidaay tu nu Pacay-cuzen mala layak tu namin, casiw-caysiw a mihcaan ni lecuhan, yu maudip henay napalekal tu " pacay-yi" a kamuan. Tusep-sepcay a mihcaan namipadang ci Pan-cin-yi tu mikinkiway tu cudadan ci Li-zen-kuy yunse tu kamuan, atu Dipun seace ci Seten-ce misulit tu " Pacay-yi zidin", atu niyadu'ay a tademaw ci Wanpan-mei-yi nisangaan nu udip tu adidiay nu zidin " Ama' Atu-nu a Pacayn nakamuan. tusep-caysep mihcaan lima a bulad Nantuo Pacay binacadan lalangawan seahuy lisecen ci Pan-wen-hui sakamusa, ayda nu pina a mihcaan nu Pacay-zen itini i nipipadang nu seahu, aydaay a wawa pasubabalaki sabaw tu pina ku matinengay musakamu tu Pacay-yi, cay tu kaw babalaki a cacay ku matinengay musakamu, sasa ayda inai'tu ku sayaway musakamuay nu tademaw. aydaay nu Nantuo Puli Aylan kiwkay tu payduyu nu sananal u kamu nu Pacay-yi ku kamu nida.
S.PHON: pa ¶aj a kamu misuajaw tu sakar~…ĺawp…ôsan a kamuan, sadikudaj musakamuaj tu kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji a tad…ômaw itini i tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp a mińß ¶aan, nina mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tatajna, ńßatidaaj tu nu pa ¶aj- ¶uz…ôn mar~…ĺa r~…ĺajak tu namin, ¶asiw- ¶ajsiw a mińß ¶aan ni r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ju maudip ńß…ônaj napar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu " pa ¶aj-ji" a kamuan. tus…ôp-s…ôp ¶aj a mińß ¶aan namipadaŇč ¶i pan- ¶in-ji tu mikinkiwaj tu ¶udadan ¶i r~…ĺi-z…ôn-kuj juns…ô tu kamuan, atu dipun s…ôa ¶…ô ¶i s…ôt…ôn- ¶…ô misur~…ĺit tu " pa ¶aj-ji zidin", atu nijadu Ē~ °aj a tad…ômaw ¶i wanpan-m…ôi-ji nisaŇčaan nu udip tu adidiaj nu zidin " ama Ē~ ° atu-nu a pa ¶ajn nakamuan. tus…ôp- ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad nantuo pa ¶aj bina ¶adan r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan s…ôańßuj r~…ĺis…ô ¶…ôn ¶i pan-w…ôn-ńßui sakamusa, ajda nu pina a mińß ¶aan nu pa ¶aj-z…ôn itini i nipipadaŇč nu s…ôańßu, ajdaaj a wawa pasubabar~…ĺaki sabaw tu pina ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu pa ¶aj-ji, ¶aj tu kaw babar~…ĺaki a ¶a ¶aj ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu, sasa ajda inai Ē~ °tu ku sajawaj musakamuaj nu tad…ômaw. ajdaaj nu nantuo pur~…ĺi ajr~…ĺan kiwkaj tu pajduju nu sananar~…ĺ u kamu nu pa ¶aj-ji ku kamu nida.
